motion: PR #101 "chore: T3 — BridgeManager (Godot side)" should be merged into feature/86-feature-phase-1-skeleton-tower

fixes.description: _on_command_completed must check result/code — silent discard of HTTP errors on write commands
fixes.details: Check _result and _code params; emit a command_failed signal or push_warning on non-200. At minimum log the failure so write command errors are observable.

fixes.description: _command_request has no timeout — hung POST stalls entire command queue permanently
fixes.details: Add _command_request.timeout = 10 after line 48, consistent with sync request timeouts at L:39 and L:44.

fixes.description: Guard command dispatch against DISCONNECTED state
fixes.details: In _enqueue_command or _process_next_command, check _connection_state before dispatching. Either hold commands until CONNECTED or emit a command_rejected signal.

fixes.description: Extract task_id from agent.state_changed SSE events
fixes.details: Read task_id from data dict in agent.state_changed dispatch. Either add it to the signal signature or update _agent_states to store {state, task_id}. Low urgency — REST re-sync covers the gap.

dismissed.reason: Real but zero impact — default is http://localhost:8081, no HTTPS use case in spec
Server (sse.go:69) always emits single-line data: — theoretical only

pr_amendments: Add command_failed signal for write command error observability
Document command queue behavior during disconnected state
